theme_archetype: Archetype 5: Luxury (Premium, Cinematic & Moody Dark Mode)

h1.description: App bar titles, large screen headers

h3.description: Standard card titles, bottom nav labels

splash_screen.animation: Fade in and slight scale up (0.95 to 1.0) over 800ms, total duration 2000ms

login_screen.footer: Privacy Policy & Terms of Conditions links in secondary text

movie_card_vertical.content: Poster, Title, Release Year, Rating, OTT Logos

ott_platform_selector.style: Large horizontal scrolling cards or grid
ott_platform_selector.active_state: Border highlighted with #F5C518, slight scale up

motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Material 3 Shared Axis (Z-axis) for deep navigation, Fade Through for Bottom Nav
motion_and_interaction.loading_states: Skeleton loaders using #181818 with a subtle #2A2A2A shimmer wave

testing_and_accessibility.automation_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (or Flutter 'Key' like Key('login-button')) for robust automated testing.

app_icon.description: App launcher and generic brand symbol

placeholder_poster.description: Fallback cinematic movie poster if TMDB image fails to load

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a Flutter application (Android/iOS) per the user requirements. Structure your Flutter project logically (Clean Architecture, MVVM or Riverpod).
Strictly adhere to the Dark Theme colors: #0D0D0D for background, #181818 for cards.
All rounded corners must be exactly 18px to match the premium 'Spotify/Letterboxd/Netflix' modern vibe.
Do NOT overcrowd the screens. Provide generous padding (e.g., 20px screen edges, 32px between vertical sections).
Build out the Firebase integration skeletons (Auth, Firestore, Cloud Functions, AdMob) and the TMDB API service layer. Add mock/guest data logic for development.
If you generate any accompanying Web/Admin portal (e.g. using .js/.jsx), use Tailwind classes mapping to these exact hex codes.
Ensure the Splash screen and Login screen utilize the provided local paths exactly as requested: 'movana_logo.png' and 'assets/images/movana_icon.png'.
Apply test keys ('Key(...)' in Flutter or 'data-testid' in HTML/JS) to all actionable items.
